positive: Minimalist circular crest design featuring a stylized bioluminescent deep-sea manta ray gliding over abstract swirling kelp and glowing cosmic dust. The composition should be centered and highly symmetrical, using bold, thick outlines and limited color palette of deep indigo, electric teal, and subtle gold accents against a dark background. Style: Neo-traditional tattoo art meets clean scientific illustration. High contrast, clean silhouettes, clean lines, vector graphic quality, scalable for apparel print.
